title: Semaphore permit .unwrap() in delivery worker can panic
description: delivery.rs line 220: semaphore.clone().acquire_owned().await.unwrap(). If the semaphore is closed (e.g. due to a programming error elsewhere that drops it), this panics and kills the delivery worker task, silently halting all outbound federation. What goes wrong: the server appears healthy but stops delivering activities. The fix is to match on the result and log+break the loop, or use expect() with a justification comment and ensure the Semaphore is never closed.
